title: 10 best herbal essential oils for baldness
description: Achillea millefolium, also known as yarrow, essential oils helps with baldness because of its stimulating and regenerative properties. The oil contains sesquiterpenes, which promote blood circulation to the scalp, helping to awaken dormant hair follicles. Its anti-inflammatory properties also soothe and calm the scalp, creating a favorable environment for hair growth.
